Piper PA34-200T Seneca II - G-BPFT - Full ownership, Cambridge

Aircraft Type: Twin Engine Fixed Wing
Year: 1980
Make: Piper
Model: PA34-200T Seneca II
Reg Number: G-BPFT
Airframe Hours: 6120
Engine Make: Continental TSIO-360-E (LH) / Continental LTSIO-360-E (RH)
Engine Hours: LH 280 SMOH / RH 440 SMOH (both overhauled by Continental authorised shop)
Prop Make: McCauley constant speed (both)
ARC: Valid to May 2026
Annual: Completed May 2024

Price: £72,000

Avionics:
- Garmin GNS 430W WAAS GPS/NAV/COMM
- Garmin SL30 NAV/COMM (backup)
- Garmin GTX 330ES ADS-B Out (Mode S ES)
- KFC 150 two-axis autopilot with altitude hold
- Narco MK-12D VOR/ILS (backup nav)
- RMI/ADF
- Full IFR panel, gyros, AI, DI, HSI

UK CofA. Type Certificated. Fully IFR rated and equipped.

Based at Cambridge Airport (EGSC). Hangar 14B. Single owner for 8 years.

Notes: Economical turbocharged twin with both engines recently overhauled. GNS 430W WAAS approach capable. KFC 150 is a capable coupled autopilot. Twin engine redundancy. Regular charter maintenance standard. Ideal IFR cross-country or European touring aircraft.
